description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a robust black metal receiver and a short, vented barrel shroud. The stock is a skeletonized thumbhole type, finished in a matte brown color, and is connected to the receiver with visible mechanical joints and a buffer tube. The magazine is a detachable box type, angled forward and finished in black, suggesting a high-capacity, rapid-reload capability. The fore-end is equipped with a ribbed grip and multiple vent holes for heat dissipation. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The overall appearance is modern and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, compact tactical shotgun with a black metal receiver, vented barrel shroud, brown thumbhole stock, and a detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the black receiver, vented barrel shroud, brown thumbhole stock, and angled box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle opening, ribbed fore-end, and the narrow profile of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock connection.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and buffer tube, with the receiver and magazine mostly obscured.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a short, vented shroud
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
